metadata.location: Ghaziabad Municipal Corporation, Main Entrance & Corridor

content: The CCTV footage from the main entrance and corridor of GMC office, dated 12.10.2023, between 15:00 and 15:45 hours, was analyzed. The following observations are noted: 1. At 15:15:02, Mr. Arjun Mehta enters the building via the main gate. No other person enters during the relevant window. 2. At 15:29:45, Mr. Mehta is seen walking toward the corridor leading to Room 304 (Ramesh Kumar’s cabin). 3. At 15:30:10, Mr. Mehta enters Room 304. No other individual is seen entering or exiting the room until 15:31:05. 4. At 15:31:08, ACB officers enter Room 304. 5. At 15:32:15, Mr. Kumar is seen being escorted out of the room. 6. No individual in a blue shirt is seen near the entrance, corridor, or cabin during the entire period. The footage is uninterrupted and timestamped. Conclusion: Only Mr. Arjun Mehta had direct contact with Mr. Ramesh Kumar during the alleged bribe transaction. The claim by Mrs. Priya Sharma of a third-party handover outside the office is not corroborated by video evidence.
